label: Global Internet Penetration
deltaNote: year-over-year increase per ITU GCR 2025; 6 billion people now connected for the first time

label: People Still Offline Worldwide
contestNote: ITU estimates 2.2B; estimates range 2.1–2.5B depending on 'active use' vs. 'occasional access' definitions; rural-urban and income divides persist

label: Starlink Direct Subscribers + Mobile Partners
source: SpaceX / Domain-B Starlink Growth Report, April 2026
deltaNote: direct residential subscribers ~6M Q1 2026; Direct-to-Cell reaching ~10M monthly active users via carrier partners

label: 4G+ Mobile Coverage (% population)
deltaNote: coverage growing but adoption still lags at ~57%

label: Gender Digital Gap (mobile internet, LMICs)
deltaNote: slowly narrowing; women 7% less likely to use mobile internet than men in LMICs

label: School Connectivity in LMICs
contestNote: Definitions vary: some estimates as low as 23% when measuring actual learning-quality broadband

label: 1GB Data Cost (avg % of monthly income, LMICs)
source: Alliance for Affordable Internet (A4AI) Affordability Report 2024
deltaNote: improving but ITU 2% affordability target still missed in 40+ countries

label: Starlink Countries with Active Service
source: SpaceX Starlink availability map / Domain-B Global Expansion Report, April 2026
deltaNote: since early 2024; constellation now 7,000+ active satellites with Direct-to-Cell coverage expanding via carrier partnerships
